arts.ttl: N’Golo Kanté confirmed as France captain in Kylian Mbappé’s absence
arts.sum: Didier Deschamps has confirmed that, in Kylian Mbappé’s (25) absence, N’Golo Kanté (33) will captain France against Israel in the UEFA Nations League on Thursday. For the second consecutive international…

arts.ttl: France vs Israel to have 60,000 EMPTY seats as security ramps up for 'high risk' Nations League clash
arts.sum: Security is a great concern for the authorities after violence at the recent match between Ajax and Maccabi Tel Aviv in Amsterdam

arts.ttl: Zinedine Zidane at centre of row as accusation fired at France boss Didier Deschamps
arts.sum: Didier Deschamps has been slammed for failing to recognise Zinedine Zidane's greatness as a player amid speculation that the former midfield maestro wants his job as France manager

arts.ttl: France’s political elite to attend Les Bleus’ match against Israel amid tense preparations
arts.sum: It has been 17 months since France last played at the Stade de France. It won’t be a warm return to the national stadium when Les Bleus face Israel in the UEFA…

arts.ttl: Israel predicted XI v France: Oscar Gloukh and Manor Solomon to start
arts.sum: Leeds United’s Manor Solomon and RB Salzburg’s Oscar Gloukh are both set to start for Israel as they take on France at the Stade de France in the UEFA Nations…

arts.ttl: France predicted XI v Israel: Warren Zaïre-Emery to start and N’Golo Kanté to captain amid wholesale changes
arts.sum: Didier Deschamps is set to field a slightly experimental side with multiple key payers absent as France prepare to take on Israel in the UEFA Nations League on Thursday night. …

arts.ttl: Thousands of police officers but few visiting fans for France-Israel soccer match after attacks
arts.sum: There will be a heavy police presence but few visiting fans at Thursday’s soccer match between France and Israel in the Nations League, with authorities in Paris on high alert amid an increasingly tense political climate. But obviously none of us within the team can be insensitive to such a heavy context,” France coach Didier Deschamps said Wednesday.

arts.ttl: France vs Israel: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: France face Israel in the UEFA Nations League on Thursday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Deschamps on Mbappé: 'Please leave him alone'
arts.sum: France coach Didier Deschamps showed frustration with questions about the absent Kylian Mbappé.

arts.ttl: How Italy will replace Ricci and Calafiori against Belgium and France in Nations League
arts.sum: Italy must cope without Samuele Ricci and Riccardo Calafiori in Nations League games against Belgium...
